name: atelier
description: Personal Claude Code marketplace — opinionated skills, slash commands, agents, and hooks Rachid uses across projects.

plugins.name: project-bootstrap
plugins.description: Drive a fresh repo through Stage-1 planning artifacts (vision, roadmap, requirements, open questions, architecture options, decisions) and prepare hand-offs for pitch deck, information architecture, screen design, and implementation slate. Resumes from whatever already exists in docs/.

plugins.name: migrate-to-interactive-claude
plugins.description: Migrate a project off `claude -p` onto a tmux-driven interactive Claude Code backend, to keep usage on the Claude subscription pool after Anthropic's 2026-06-15 billing split.
